title: Coaching Institute Banner Design
brief: I need a clean, premium-looking roadside banner (10 ft × 5 ft) for my coaching institute, DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES. The design must feel professional and serious, stay readable from a distance, and present information without clutter. Core copy to feature – exactly as written: • Institute name: DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES • Tagline: Where Learning Meets Success • Courses Offered: Pre-Foundation: 5th to 8th (All Subjects) 9th & 10th: Maths, Science, Social Science, English 11th & 12th: PCMB & Commerce • Highlight: ADMISSIONS OPEN • Contact (make 8103332901 the most prominent, then 8989871223 and 9589110600) • Location: Railway Station Road, Multai • Features: Small Batch Size · Personal Attention · Regular Tests · Doubt Sessions Visual direction • Primary colour #046CB8, secondary #02ADEF, CMYK-ready. • Big, bold Inter font across headings and key numbers. • Icons that hint at subjects, a confident but minimal photo of students, and understated geometric elements to maintain a modern, minimalistic feel. • Balanced spacing and alignment so every line is instantly legible from the road. Deliverables (within 24 hours) 1. Editable layered PSD 2. Print-ready PDF in CMYK, high resolution suitable for large-format flex printing (no pixelation) I’ll sign off once the file opens cleanly, colours match the specs, and text hierarchy is crystal clear at full size.
